differential_diagnoses: Metastatic carcinoma with bone marrow involvement (leukoerythroblastosis)
Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) with secondary cytopenias
next_steps: Perform bone marrow biopsy and aspirate (with cytogenetics, flow cytometry, and biopsy for malignancy/hemophagocytosis)
Calculate HScore and order diagnostic tests for HLH (sCD25/soluble IL-2 receptor, ferritin trend, triglycerides, fibrinogen)
Obtain MRI of the spine to investigate lytic lesions or infiltrative processes as the cause of back pain
Request ADAMTS13 activity to definitively rule out TTP
Initiate goal-of-care discussions in light of the likely underlying malignancy or severe systemic process
Manage acute pancreatitis with supportive care and evaluate for occult underlying pancreatic malignancy
